item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

There once was a tariff so steep,
That factories began to creep,
To Vietnam they fled,
Leaving China in dread,
While Xi’s plans were costly to keep.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • US and China Meet for First Time Since Trump Imposed Tariffs
  • This Is the Trade Conflict Xi Jinping Has Been Waiting For
  • Chinese Factories Are Moving Manufacturing to Vietnam to Escape Trump’s Tariffs

item.title: Tariffs and Tumult
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs and Tumult

Trump’s tariffs set economies fraught,
With China and the U.S. caught.
Factories slowed down,
And growth lost its crown,
While science funds faced a drought.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Economy Shrank in First Quarter as Trump Tariffs Loomed
  • Chinese Factories Slow in Early Sign of Trade War’s Toll
  • Trump’s Cuts to Science Funding Could Hurt U.S. Economy, Study Shows

item.title: Tariff Terrors and Economic Woes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Terrors and Economic Woes

Trump’s tariffs leave markets in dread,
With factories scratching their head.
The Fed’s in a stew,
Debating what’s true,
As recession fears wildly spread.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • As Trump’s Tariffs Stoke Economic Uncertainty, the Fed Debates Its Next Steps
  • Trump Loves Tariffs. Do Americans?
  • How Trump’s Tariffs Are Hitting One Chinese Factory Owner: ‘We Are Helpless’

item.title: The Battle for Blue-Collar Hearts
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Battle for Blue-Collar Hearts

In factory towns laid low by the shock,
New investments now tick like a clock.
While Harris and Trump,
In debates, fiercely bump,
For working-class votes they both flock.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Factory Towns Laid Low by the ‘China Shock’ Are Benefiting From New Investments
  • Working-Class Voters Are Pivotal. Both Candidates Are Vying for Their Support.
